title: migrates-from + verifier-checked lifting
manager: Deploy v2 while v1 instances are still mid-flight — a declared, verifier-checked lifting of old snapshots into the new val schema, so an in-progress machine can be upgraded without losing its state. `migrates from v1 { new := expr(old...) }` is the migration, and the checker proves the lifted state is in-domain and the contracts still hold, so you can't ship a migration that quietly corrupts every live machine it touches.
cs: `migrates from v1 { new := expr(old...); }` blocks; checker verifies lifted states in-domain + contracts hold + refinement verdict; the safe schema-evolution mechanism for live machines.
